race.comment: GEETEE FORTY (7) got too far back last time at headquarters but finished full of running. His recent sectionals suggest he will run the trip and the 2kg claim gets him in light again. Bold showing anticipated. RECIPROCAL (3) has come back in good order this prep and finds another suitable contest fourth-up. Distance is no query and the inside draw should have him prominent early. Sure to be very competitive. HIGH SOCIETY GIRL (4) was a bit better here last time when only warming very late over the 1800m. She's already a two-time winner over this trip, so should relish the rise. CARASHAN CHLOE (5) has been mixing her form but boasts peaks that are competitive. Watch for her running on late. MAGNETIC EDGE (2) has found himself too far back all throughout this campaign but now gets what appears a much-needed rise in trip. Is another that will be doing his best work late.
